title: Voices Call People Onto Deadly Train Tracks
description: Three people died crossing Kentucky's Pope Lick Trestle after hearing voices from empty air calling them forward. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 847: The Voices That Call People to Their Death...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Multiple fatalities on Kentucky's Pope Lick Trestle follow the same disturbing pattern. Survivors report hearing voices from empty air moments before trains approach. Subscribe for more classified cases.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption:
Three people died hearing voices

All three victims on Kentucky's Pope Lick Trestle reported the same phenomenon: voices calling them onto active railway tracks from empty air. The Department keeps watching this location.

facebook_metadata.reels_caption: Three people died on the same Kentucky train trestle after hearing voices that weren't there. Each one stepped onto active tracks moments before impact.
